tour_name: Le Marais Free Tour: Where Parisians Go
review_text: Fantastic walk through the Marais! Our guide Antoine knew every hidden courtyard and the falafel recommendation alone was worth it. Felt like exploring with a local friend.

tour_name: Montmartre Paris Free Tour: Moulin Rouge to Sacre Coeur
review_text: Great overview of Montmartre, lots of artist history. Only downside was the group size — about 25 people, hard to hear at times. Guide handled it well though.

tour_name: Paris Left Bank: Writers, Revolution & Black Coffee
review_text: Hemingway, revolution, and the best coffee stop. Camille brought the Latin Quarter to life — we extended our stay in Paris just to do another Discover Walks tour.

tour_name: Paris Icons Express Free Tour: Notre-Dame to Louvre
review_text: Perfect for a first morning in Paris. Two hours, all the icons, zero filler. Tip-based and worth every euro we gave.

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: Lovely mix of famous spots and corners I'd never have found alone. Started a few minutes late but the guide more than made up for it.

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: I had a fantastic experience on this tour, thanks to our guide! From the start, he was friendly, engaging, and full of energy, making the whole experience enjoyable and memorable. He shared fascinating stories and insights at each stop, turning a simple tour into an unforgettable adventure.

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: Guide didn’t deliver on the title. No real secrets or gems included in the content. Guide walked very fast, cut his delivery short, and needs to up his game appreciably.

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: The guide is very knowledgeable and she could really uncover the hidden gems. Thank you

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: I booked this tour not really knowing to expect given that I had been to Paris a few times before and done other walking tours. But this tour was a great little surprise - my guide was super knowledgeable and funny, it was a very pleasant experience despite the heavy rain on the day. I'd highly recommend it :)

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: We recently took a free walking tour of Paris’ hidden gems, and it was one of the best experiences we’ve had. Our guide was exceptionally knowledgeable and made the tour incredibly interesting and engaging. They shared a range of fascinating facts that went well beyond what you can find online. From quaint alleys to lesser-known historical and artistic sites, every stop was enriched by the guide’s insights and enthusiasm. Highly recommended for anyone looking to explore the unseen side of Paris! Definitely one of the best walking tours we’ve done.

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: The tour Is really enjoyable, the guide Is funny and the time flies while you can discover some real beautiful places in Paris you normally don't see Really recommended!

review_text: We have booked the tour for a group of students. The tour has been perfect. The guide shared interesting facts and anecdotes, responded to personal questions and had helpful tips for the rest of the day. We finished at Marché des enfants rouges.

review_text: The tour was wonderful and the guide, Togu, was warm and welcoming and knowledgeable and made us all enjoy the time with him. I loved his interaction with the tourists and he kept everyone engaged for the 1 1/2 hours of the tour.

She is very knowledgeable and shares a lot of interesting information in a clear and engaging way. You can really feel her passion, which makes the experience both informative and enjoyable. Highly recommended!

review_text: I love these free tours. The guides are so friendly, often multi-lingual, knowledgeable and passionate about their subject and city. Flo was no exception. Merci beaucoup pour une autre tour par excellence!

tour_name: Paris Left Bank: Writers, Revolution & Black Coffee
review_text: There were three of us on the tour which stoll went ahead. We started at Notre Dame and ended at the Sorbonne. Along the way we saw a baptism and Romanian church service. The guide was informative and well orhanised. He engaged well as we spoke about his life in the Latin Quarter and his love for cinema. Most enjoyable.

review_text: It was a nice tour and very knowledgeable, gives you real parisian vibe. Unfortunatelly due to heavy rain we had to finish tour earlier but still we enjoyed it

tour_name: Paris Left Bank: Writers, Revolution & Black Coffee
review_text: The guide was absolutely friendly, well educated and informed and provided us with a wonderful tour.

tour_name: Paris Left Bank: Writers, Revolution & Black Coffee
review_text: Audrey made this tour the absolute best experience we have had of Paris so far! Her knowledge of architecture and culture is impressive, and her attitude is cordial. She showed us many interesting places like the Sorbonne and Notre-Dame, but also hidden gems like Saint Julian Church, medeival streets, and The Museum of Middle Ages. She answered all our questions and we forgot about the cold weather and enjoyed the experience. We recommend the tour wholeheartedly! Thank you, Audrey!

tour_name: Paris Left Bank: Writers, Revolution & Black Coffee
review_text: We were fortunate to have a wonderful private tour. We learned a great deal about the history and current life in London. We were able to ask many questions and received helpful answers. We highly recommend this tour.
